evidence_sentence: An increasing body of evidence indicates that OC carcinogenesis is associated, at least in the early stages, to insufficient autophagy.

Metformin is a well-known AMPK (AMP-activated protein kinase) activator that suppresses cancer stem cells (CSCs) in some cancers.
